# init()

**Initializer**

Initializes the FoveatedStreamingSession.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor init()
```

## Discussion

To attempt a connection, call [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/connect(endpoint:)].
title: init()
